questions.question_text_with_code_context: Which API endpoint in the Flask application returns the list of product data? ```Python from flask import Flask from flask_cors import CORS app = Flask(__name__) CORS(app) products = [ { "id": 1, "name": "Chopping Board", "price": 360, "description": "A durable wooden chopping board for daily kitchen use.", "image": "https://bit.ly/3XCmlH5" }, { "id": 2, "name": "Sketch Pens", "price": 30, "description": "12 bright colors perfect for school and art projects.", "image": "https://bit.ly/3X8Tb2d" } ] @app.route('/products') def get_products(): return products @app.route('/product_list') def get_products(): return "product" @app.route('/getProducts') def get_products(): return "product" app.run(debug=True) ```
questions.reasoning_steps_used: identify which API endpoint URL in the given Flask code returns the list of product data
